title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Health Board Resolution No. 2022-001 Dated October 21, 2022 Entitled ? Resolution Supporting the Establishment and Operation of a Health Facility (INFIRMARY) at Bernardo Village, Barangay Mayondon, Los Baños, Laguna, to Provide a 24-hour Emergency Health Care Services and Short Time Admission and Management of Non-complicated Patients or Cases.?
